srcDoc.html:
Inference & Privacy Exposure Signals

Inversion, membership, and persistence indicators

Model Inversion Risk Indicators

Evaluating

Risk of extracting training data or raw identifiers from the model.

Evidence:
  • Evaluating feature cardinality and direct mapping...

Membership Inference Risk

Evaluating

Risk of determining if an individual's data was in the training set.

Evidence:
  • Evaluating performance gaps and memorization signals...

Output Leakage Indicators

Evaluating

Whether predictions contain identity-linked state or return identifiers.

Evidence:
  • Evaluating output signatures...

Logging Persistence Exposure

Evaluating

Whether inference inputs/outputs are written to persistent logs.

Evidence:
  • Evaluating sink configurations...
